# Session Log

> **Reset this file at the start of each new task/session.**
> The agent updates this in real-time as work progresses.
> It's a running record of what happened, what was decided, and what changed.

---

## Session: [Task or Feature Name]
**Date:** YYYY-MM-DD  
**Agent:** GitHub Copilot / Claude  

---

## Active State

**Current step:** [what the agent is doing right now]  
**Last completed:** [most recently finished step]  
**Next up:** [what comes after current step]

---

## Progress Log

> Append a new entry after each significant action. Newest entries go at the bottom.

```
[HH:MM] — [What was done and what the outcome was]
[HH:MM] — [Next action taken]
```

---

## Context & Assumptions

> Things the agent has inferred or been told that affect this session.
> Useful for resuming after an interruption.

- [assumption or context item]
- [assumption or context item]

---

## Corrections Received

> When the developer corrects something mid-session, log it here
> AND append the lesson to `.github/tasks/lessons.md`.

| Correction | What I Changed | Lesson Captured |
|------------|----------------|-----------------|
| [describe] | [what was fixed] | ✅ / ❌ |

---

## Summary (fill in when session ends)

**What was completed:**  
**What was NOT completed and why:**  
**Anything the developer should know:**
